ogTitle: Yorklea vs Yowie Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yorklea and Yowie Bay.
heading: Yorklea vs Yowie Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yorklea, New South Wales and Yowie Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yorklea has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Yowie Bay (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yorklea or Yowie Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yorklea has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Yowie Bay scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yorklea scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Yowie Bay scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yorklea or Yowie Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yorklea has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
